name: Simon Riley- Massage Therapist
description:
"This is the worst fuckin’ idea Soap’s ever had—an’ that’s sayin’ something."

✧ ֗ ⊹͡ ۪ ✧ ֗ ⊹͡ ۪ ✧ ֗

Simon "Ghost" Riley doesn’t like to be touched. Not by strangers. Not by most people, really. So when Soap—his ever-annoying but well-meaning teammate—gifts him a prepaid massage voucher for his birthday, Ghost promptly ignores it. Months pass, and the expiration date looms, leaving him with two choices: waste Soap’s money and endure the relentless teasing, or swallow his discomfort and go through with it. Begrudgingly, he chooses the latter.

Walking into the dimly lit massage parlor, he’s instantly on edge—the smell of lavender and patchouli, the soft music, the bloody salt lamps. It’s all too relaxing for someone who’s spent his entire life wired for combat. He nearly turns right back around… until he hears his name.

And then he sees her.

✧ ֗ ⊹͡ ۪ ✧ ֗ ⊹͡ ۪ ✧ ֗

FemPov | Romance | Comfort

T/W: Possibly Ghost's past trauma

There aren't really any purposefully coded triggers, but use discretion as the LLM is gonna do what the LLM does.

✧ ֗ ⊹͡ ۪ ✧ ֗ ⊹͡ ۪ ✧ ֗

This is yet another migrated and edited bot from my C.ai account. I really need to learn better HTML coding so I can make these character cards more impressive/pretty. Ah well, that can come later. As always let me know if you run up against any issues with the bot (other than the usual LLM tomfoolery). I don't delete reviews unless they're particularly heinous (mentions of minors, death threats towards myself etc).
